title: Monday.com & Chat GPT
excerpt: As organizations are starting to look into how they can use Chat GPT, I would like to suggest that Monday.com explores how to add this as a future features/integrations.

posts.author: JessicaB (Jessica Bond)
posts.cookedHtml: As organizations are starting to look into how they can use Chat GPT, I would like to suggest that Monday.com explores how to add this as a future features/integrations.

posts.author: jenstratton (Jen Stratton)
posts.cookedHtml: yes, I would love to see AI project management tasks built out based on information on the board or similar templates

posts.author: Martinjoseph (Martin Joseph)
posts.cookedHtml: Ignoring Chat GPT might be a big mistake as this technology based tool has a booming future ahead on the behalf of minimizing the work load on human.

posts.author: MarkHHH (Mark Laurence)
posts.cookedHtml: As a long term HubSpot user, I switched to Monday four years ago when I started a new small business, mainly because of pricing considerations. However, having now seen the release of HubSpot’s new capabilities based on OpenAI’s API, I believe many/most of my use cases for Monday.com will be obselete very soon. Will be looking at a switch back to HubSpot within the next 3-6 months if Monday.com doesn’t keep up with this tech and use the APIs too.

posts.author: RonTuretzky (Ron Turetzky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ok so obviously suggesting and creating automations, merging or creating columns, asking for analysis on trends over time right off the gate

next level stuff is suggesting connect boards columns, creating dashboards, suggesting integrations, commenting on items, tagging people about tasks , suggesting views and filters based on usage

above that is suggesting new boards, predicting what sort of tasks are being made off the platform and integrating them, and overall suggesting new ways of handling tasks, or even providing expertise on the tasks at hand.

yea would love to see this. If anyone here wants to collborate on a project like this, that would be great.

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yoav:

You are weclome to give a try to BusinessGPT for moday enabling to ask anything about your monday data and more data sources using ChatGPT, Available in the market place for free trial here:

Your app is a great idea - but I tried it and it gives inaccurate answers to very basic queries. Frankly it is not even ready for beta testing yet.

posts.author: yoavc (Yoav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rkaplan
I am sorry to hear your ambivalent feedback.

Currently it is mainly focused on getting insitghts from the description which is the free text are that normal regular reporting would not be able to analyse. Yet the model should also indersatand some other type of fields like due date and , status and more.

Kindly feel free to contact us (agatsoftware.ai) If you are willing to share your specific prompts and expected results for our team to work with you on improving the quality of the answers.

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yoav:

Currently it is mainly focused on getting insitghts from the description which is the free text are that normal regular reporting would not be able to analyse. Yet the model should also indersatand some other type of fields like due date and , status and more.

I did a very simple prompt - “Show me items due today” - on a board with a field clearly marked with a “Due Date” column

It gave me 3 items due last week and missed all 20 due today

Moreover I was able to create a Make.com scenario in 20 minutes to list all the board items and a custom ChatGPT in another 20 minutes which activates the make.com scenario and
retrieves the items due perfectly.
